title: What to Expect From Pinnacle West (PNW) in Q1 Earnings?
text: Pinnacle West Capital's (PNW) first-quarter results are likely to reflect the benefits of increased demand and customer growth, partly offset by an increase in expenses.

title: Earnings Preview: Pinnacle West (PNW) Q1 Earnings Expected to Decline

title: Pinnacle West Sets Date for 2022 First-Quarter Financial Results, Webcast/Conference Call
text: PHOENIX--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pinnacle West Capital Corp. plans to release its 2022 first-quarter financial results before U.S. financial markets open on Wednesday, May 4, 2022.

title: Reasons to Add Pinnacle West Capital (PNW) to Your Portfolio
